lines.en_lit: Rabbi Yehuda maintains place where atonement is achieved once a year, And Rabbi Neḥemya maintains the actions through which atonement is achieved once a year,

Is that to say to Rabbi Yehuda place written? Rather, This is the reasoning of Rabbi Yehuda: It is written: “This” and it is written: “Once One to exclude in white garments outside and one to exclude in gold garments.
And Rabbi Neḥemya one to exclude gold garments, and one to exclude remainders that are not indispensable. And Rabbi Yehuda if indispensable, indispensable; and if not indispensable, not indispensable

As it was taught “And when he has finished atoning for the sacred place” if he performed the atonement, he has finished and if he did not perform the atonement, he has not finished. the statement of Rabbi Akiva. Rabbi Yehuda said to him: Why do we not say if he finished he has performed atonement; and if he did not finish, he has not performed atonement? that if one of the presentations is lacking he did nothing.

And we say What between them? Rabbi Yoḥanan and Rabbi Yehoshua ben Levi One said: There is between them the source from which they derive their interpretation, And one said: There is between them remainders indispensable
And did Rabbi Yoḥanan say this, But didn’t Rabbi Yoḥanan say Rabbi Neḥemya taught in accordance with the statement of the one who said that remainders are indispensable? difficult.

Rabbi Ḥanina said: incense that scooped before the slaughtering of the bull, he did nothing. In accordance with It is not in accordance with Rabbi Yehuda. As, if Rabbi Yehuda, didn’t say when it is written “statute” it is written to actions performed in white garments within

Even you say Rabbi Yehuda, for the purpose of inside is considered like inside. We learned if the blood spills before completed the presentations that inside he bring other blood, and sprinkle again from the beginning inside. And if it is so, should have said he must return and scoop
